meaning: n.pl.听众席,观众席,<美>会堂,礼堂
examples: So the inter space-shape of auditoria should be perfect combination of traditional building-space and modern technique.
Monitor loudspeakers are typically used with installed sound systems in medium or large venues, for example, schools, auditoria, houses of worship, or live performance venues.
Several auditoria at the centre of the complex are designed to be reconfigurable and can therefore be used for various purposes, including lectures, performances, concerts, receptions and meetings.
